projects.name: Text-to-Image using Diffusion
projects.description: Trained a text-to-image diffusion model using UNet with cross-attention, VAE for latent space representation, and CLIP text embeddings for high-quality image generation. Implemented distributed training with PyTorch DDP on AWS SageMaker Training Jobs scaling to multiple GPUs with spot training for 68% cost reduction, used DagsHub server for MLflow logging and DVC for end-to-end pipeline automation.

projects.name: Text Summarization GPT
projects.description: Pretrained a 125M-parameter, 128-token decoder-only transformer model on a large text corpus using AWS Sagemaker, forming a GPT. Fine-tuned GPT on the XSum dataset for summarization task using teacher forcing, achieving a 5.4 ROUGE score.

projects.name: Image Depth Map Prediction
projects.description: Designed a depth estimation model with a pre-trained Vision Transformer, achieving 19 cm RMSE for depth prediction. Refined depth maps with decoding convolution layers, increasing precision by 15% for complex environments.

projects.name: Automated Stock Price Prediction System
projects.description: Developed a CNN-based stock price prediction model, enhanced with XGBoost for feature selection, increasing accuracy. Implemented DVC for pipeline management and MLFlow for performance tracking, enhancing reproducibility by 60%.

projects.name: Lane Segmentation
projects.description: Created a U-Net model for lane segmentation, achieving 80% IoU for accurate lane detection in autonomous vehicles. Integrated the model into a Flask app for real-time lane detection, enhancing user experience.

description: Developed ML pipelines for block trade allocation and time series forecasting, improving operational efficiency by 15%, reducing risk, and enhancing cash flow. Validated model optimizations through A/B testing.
Automated post-trade data cleaning and matching with XGBoost, reducing manual workload by 30%, improving accuracy, and speeding up execution.
Enhanced alignment between live and simulated trading environments by 50%, analyzing gigabytes of stock data with Matplotlib and pandas to refine testing and strategies.
Optimized trading model data access by 75% using PostgreSQL, SQL, and Python to automate workflows and accelerate the ML lifecycle.
Achieved 90% IoU in car damage detection by implementing a Mask R-CNN model in TensorFlow and OpenCV, significantly reducing manual effort in damage assessment.
Increased claim approval efficiency by 60% through a Django web platform, reducing approval time and labor costs.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence
description: GTA for Applied Machine Learning, Cloud Application Development, Web Development and Open-Source Software

Relevant Courses: Data Structures and Algorithms, Database Management, Big Data Analytics, Computer Organization and Architecture, Operating System, Advanced Data Management Technology, Data Mining and Business Intelligence.

achievements.title: Runner-up at Smart India Hackathon 2019
achievements.description: Led a 5-member team to develop a smart research content management platform for PD Hinduja Hospital, reducing research proposal-to-approval time by 60% and enhancing process efficiency.

achievements.title: IEEE Paper Publication
achievements.description: Led the development of a computer vision interface enabling control via hand gestures and voice using TensorFlow and OpenCV, improving user interaction by 40%, resulting in an IEEE paper publication in March 2019.
